manualItems.issue: Optional: split into full-coverage probe + defensive subset (Option B)
No negative case for order(number:) with bad/unauthorized number

schemaValidation.notes: Both CustomerOrderType.coupons and CurrencyType.name exist in the live introspected schema. DV-009 does not apply — the runtime INVALID_OPERATION errors are production resolver bugs, not test authoring defects.

context7Findings.observation: Official vc-docs CurrencyType reference lists 6 fields and omits 'name', though 'name' is present in the live introspected schema. Confirms 'name' is an undocumented/orphan field.
'coupons' [String] is both documented and in the live schema. Failure is a production resolver bug, not a schema/docs mismatch.

duplicationCrossSuite.note: Cross-cutting performance probes overlap xOrder list queries at different depths — complementary, not duplicate

recommendation: Option A — keep ORD-GQL-013 unchanged as schema-coverage canary; file JIRA bugs for the two production resolver errors (CustomerOrderType.coupons + CurrencyType.name INVALID_OPERATION). Option B (split into full + defensive subset) logged as Should-Fix optional enhancement.

productionBugsExposed.bug: CustomerOrderType.coupons resolver throws INVALID_OPERATION on orders with no coupons
CurrencyType.name resolver throws INVALID_OPERATION; field also undocumented in vc-docs
